author: nc1234
content: Looks like this would also not be caught by block processing's `process_payload_attestation` because https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/b8cf07f4d7599f37a1c6e2bb0201259628a30181/specs/gloas/beacon-chain.md?plain=1#L1773 `state.latest_block_header.parent_root` is the last canonical block too.
